Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-24 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data shows two exceptional long-term performers at the top of the ranking. EFXT ranks #1 with a score of 90.6, posting explosive recent returns (300.62% over 1 year, 307.62% over 5 years) while maintaining all four moving average confirmations and a "strong_buy" signal. However, EFXT shows a critical weakness: it dramatically underperformed SPY by 40.06% over the past 10 years and QQQ by 296.49%, suggesting this is a recent phenomenon rather than a secular trend. MTZ presents a starkly different profile with extraordinary long-term performance (1,685% over 10 years, outperforming SPY by 1,441%), strong intermediate returns (217.64% over 1 year), and a remarkable 6.14x ratio from 5-year to 10-year returns that indicates sustained acceleration. While EFXT appears to be a short-to-medium term momentum spike, MTZ represents the type of sustained secular outperformance this long-term ranker is designed to identify.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
